workloads.description: Matrix-vector compute kernel aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf dimensions (Rows=32768, Cols=2048, F32/F32, Impl=Naive, Swizzle=0, 100 dispatches).
workloads.name: matrix-vector multiply 32768x2048 f32 (naive swizzle0)
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only on current Apple Metal host lane: Dawn delegate rejects the 256MB storage binding for this matrix dimension with maxStorageBufferBindingSize validation failure, so the strict comparable lane must exclude it until the workload is split or the Dawn-side limit surface changes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (baseline/comparison divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: workgroup-atomic 1024
workloads.description: Workgroup-atomic compute kernel with 1024 workgroups, matching Dawn WorkgroupAtomicPerf. Doe runs native MSL via MTLComputeCommandEncoder, bypassing Tint compilation entirely.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Doe dispatches pre-compiled MSL via MTLComputeCommandEncoder, bypassing Tint compilation entirely. Both sides execute the same atomic workgroup reduction logic.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (baseline/comparison divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.description: Non-atomic workgroup compute kernel with 1024 workgroups, 100 dispatches per step, matching Dawn WorkgroupAtomicPerf non-atomic variant.
workloads.name: workgroup-non-atomic 1024
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Doe dispatches pre-compiled MSL; Dawn routes through Tint->MSL. Both sides execute the same non-atomic workgroup reduction logic.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (baseline/comparison divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.comparabilityNotes: Doe-owned apples-to-apples single-block Gemma-3-270M-shaped prefill sequence. Both sides execute the same retained inference kernels and identical buffer-write + dispatch command stream under the runtime compare harness.
workloads.description: Single-block Gemma-3-270M-shaped prefill pass over 32 prompt tokens using Doe-owned retained inference kernels and seeded uniform/token buffer writes.
workloads.name: gemma-3 270m shaped prefill 32tok

workloads.comparabilityNotes: Doe-owned apples-to-apples single-block Gemma-3-270M-shaped decode step. Both sides execute the same retained inference kernels and identical buffer-write + dispatch command stream under the runtime compare harness.
workloads.description: Single-token Gemma-3-270M-shaped decode step using Doe-owned retained inference kernels plus explicit cache/position uniform writes.
workloads.name: gemma-3 270m shaped decode 1tok

workloads.comparabilityNotes: Doe-owned apples-to-apples combined Gemma-3-270M-shaped inference sequence. Both sides execute one retained-kernel command stream containing a 64-token prefill phase followed by 64 single-token decode phases under the runtime compare harness.
workloads.description: Single-run Gemma-3-270M-shaped inference sequence with a 64-token prefill phase and 64 sequential single-token decode phases using Doe-owned retained inference kernels plus explicit buffer writes.
workloads.name: gemma-3 270m shaped prefill 64tok + decode 64tok

workloads.comparabilityNotes: Doe-owned apples-to-apples literal-production-style Gemma-3-270M inference unit. Both sides execute the same prefill-plus-decode command stream with production-style kernel families and entry points, while dense synthetic buffers stand in for real q4k and f16kv payloads.
workloads.description: Minimal Doe-owned Gemma-3-270M literal-production-style inference unit with a 32-token prefill followed by a single decode token.
workloads.name: gemma-3 270m literal prefill 32tok + decode 1tok

workloads.comparabilityNotes: Doe-owned apples-to-apples single-block Gemma-3-1B-shaped prefill sequence. Both sides execute the same retained inference kernels and identical buffer-write + dispatch command stream under the runtime compare harness.
workloads.description: Single-block Gemma-3-1B-shaped prefill pass over 32 prompt tokens using Doe-owned retained inference kernels and seeded uniform/token buffer writes.
workloads.name: gemma-3 1b shaped prefill 32tok

workloads.comparabilityNotes: Doe-owned apples-to-apples single-block Gemma-3-1B-shaped decode step. Both sides execute the same retained inference kernels and identical buffer-write + dispatch command stream under the runtime compare harness.
workloads.description: Single-token Gemma-3-1B-shaped decode step using Doe-owned retained inference kernels plus explicit cache/position uniform writes.
workloads.name: gemma-3 1b shaped decode 1tok

workloads.comparabilityNotes: Doe-owned apples-to-apples combined Gemma-3-1B-shaped inference sequence. Both sides execute one retained-kernel command stream containing a 64-token prefill phase followed by 64 single-token decode phases under the runtime compare harness.
workloads.description: Single-run Gemma-3-1B-shaped inference sequence with a 64-token prefill phase and 64 sequential single-token decode phases using Doe-owned retained inference kernels plus explicit buffer writes.
workloads.name: gemma-3 1b shaped prefill 64tok + decode 64tok

workloads.comparabilityNotes: Doe-owned apples-to-apples Monte Carlo compute contract. Both sides execute the same deterministic fixed-sample path-tracing command stream and identical reduction passes under the runtime compare harness.
workloads.description: Fixed-shape Monte Carlo compute workload with 131072 path threads, 256 samples per path, 8 bounces per sample, and a deterministic reduction over accumulated path radiance.
workloads.name: monte carlo fixed samples 131072 paths 256 samples 8 bounces

workloads.comparabilityNotes: Doe-owned apples-to-apples multistage stable-fluids compute contract. Both sides execute the same deterministic seed, advection, divergence, Jacobi pressure, projection, and dye update command stream under the runtime compare harness.
workloads.description: Deterministic multistage stable-fluids workload with a 256x256 grid, 18 Jacobi pressure iterations per simulation step, and 4 full solver steps over velocity and dye fields.
workloads.name: stable fluids multistage 256 grid 18 pressure 4 steps
